g.text: SEE DETAIL 5 FOR CONDITION WHEN WEB DOUBLER PLATE IS REQUIRED
SHOWN WITH SINGLE BOLT ROW (SIM AT DOUBLE BOLT ROW)
FOR STIFFENER THICKNESS REQUIREMENTS, SEE CONNECTION SCHEDULE
USE 8 mm FILLET WELD FOR THICKNESSES
30 mm, 12 mm FILLET WELD FOR THICKNESSES
FOR STIFF PLATES > 50 mm CONTACT COREBRACE FOR FILLET WELD SIZE.
FOR STIFF PLATES > 2" CONTACT COREBRACE FOR FILLET WELD SIZE.
SEE DETAIL 5 FOR CONDITION WHEN WEB DOUBLER PLATE IS REQUIRED
SHOWN WITH SINGLE BOLT ROW (SIM AT DOUBLE BOLT ROW)
FOR STIFFENER THICKNESS REQUIREMENTS, SEE CONNECTION SCHEDULE
USE 8 mm FILLET WELD FOR THICKNESSES

FOR STIFF PLATES > 2" CONTACT COREBRACE FOR FILLET WELD SIZE.
